documents.title: Synthetic 2025 Form 10-K Fixture
documents.body_text:
FIXTURE DATA — Synthetic Apple filing text for deterministic tests.
Apple Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables, and services.
iPhone, Mac, iPad, Wearables Home and Accessories, Apple Services, and Apple Silicon are core Apple businesses or products in this fixture.
Apple Silicon is a component of iPhone, Mac, and iPad product platforms.
Apple Services serves consumer end markets through digital content, cloud, payment, and support offerings.

documents.title: Synthetic Supplier Responsibility Fixture
documents.body_text:
FIXTURE DATA — Synthetic Apple supplier report for deterministic tests.
TSMC Semiconductor Manufacturing fabricates Apple-designed silicon used across Apple products.
Samsung Display Components supplies display panels associated with Apple product manufacturing.
SK hynix Memory is identified as a potential memory supplier in this synthetic test record.
Foxconn Contract Manufacturing assembles selected Apple products for distribution.
Broadcom Connectivity Components supplies wireless connectivity components used in Apple devices.
Sony Image Sensors supplies camera imaging components used in iPhone products.
Corning Glass Components supplies durable cover materials used in Apple devices.
Qorvo Radio Frequency supplies radio-frequency components used in iPhone products.
Texas Instruments Power Management supplies power-management components used in Apple devices.
Arm Architecture licenses processor architecture used by Apple silicon designs.

documents.title: Synthetic Apple Channel Program Fixture
documents.body_text:
FIXTURE DATA — Synthetic Apple channel text for deterministic tests.
US Wireless Carriers sell iPhone products to downstream customers.
Technology Distributors distribute Apple products through authorized reseller networks.
Enterprise Channels sell Apple products and services to organizational customers.
Consumer End Markets purchase Apple products and services through retail and online channels.
AT&T and Verizon are represented as carrier channels for iPhone in this synthetic fixture.
Ingram Micro and TD SYNNEX are represented as technology distributors for Apple products in this synthetic fixture.

documents.title: Synthetic Apple Developer Program Release Fixture
documents.body_text:
FIXTURE DATA — Synthetic Apple press release for deterministic tests.
Apple Services provides a platform for software developers through official developer programs.
Apple Inc. serves enterprise customers through Apple at Work channels.

source_plan.rationale_en: Use synthetic official-company fixtures covering products, suppliers, channels, and developer programs.
